meta.name: SolidJS (KISS, Client-Only)
meta.description: Minimal SolidJS SPA using Vite. No server layer. Simple components + local state via solid-js/store.

architecture.summary: A small, client-only SolidJS application. Components (CMP) use signals/stores for UI state. Stores (STO) keep shared state. No backend/API glyphs in this shape.

layers.name: UI Layer (CMP)
layers.description: SolidJS components. No IO assumptions. UI logic only; any side effects should be isolated behind functions.

layers.name: State Layer (STO)
layers.description: Shared state via solid-js/store. Stores expose state + actions.

layers.name: Shared Logic (FNC)
layers.description: Small pure helpers and boundary wrappers that CMP/STO can call.
